title: Belt Buckle
description: While you have no potions, you have [blue]2[/blue] additional [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Applies +2 Dexterity whenever the player has no potions in their inventory. The bonus is removed when any potion is obtained and reapplied when all potions are discarded or used.
